title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Control-Loop Lens: Memory Privacy
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops memory privacy increment in a context and durable-memory policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.
Compact history into goal, decisions, evidence, unresolved work, and restart commands.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
